## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is it needed?

## Changes

- [ ] Backend logic
- [ ] Frontend/UI
- [ ] Security-related code
- [ ] Automation/Scheduling
- [ ] Documentation

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Manual run tested (`python -m app.automation --output-dir exports --offer-mode auto`)
- [ ] CI workflow passed (`test`)
- [ ] PR Quality workflow passed (`Lint + Security`)

## SmartMeal Rule Checks

- [ ] No pork introduced
- [ ] Offer usage logic still valid
- [ ] Validity dates handled correctly
- [ ] Budget calculation remains plausible

## Security Checklist

- [ ] Input validation preserved/updated
- [ ] No secrets added to repo
- [ ] Security headers/rate limiting unaffected or intentionally changed

## Screenshots / Output

If UI changed, add screenshots.
If planner output changed, add a short before/after snippet.

## Rollback Plan

- Revert commit(s)
- Restore previous workflow/settings if needed
